data.name: 地下城的女騎士
data.detailed_description:
💘CHECK THIS OUT!💘




關於此遊戲

遊戲內容


在遊戲中你作為王國中最強的女騎士，受附近村民之託，前往探索令人感到恐懼的地下城，潛入地下城的深處，打倒作惡多端的邪惡魔物。這是一款第三人稱視角的3D動作遊戲，玩家要自己孤身一人踏入戰場、收集補給品並一步一步強化自身的實力。但如果被敵人抓住的話，後果將不堪設想...

H場景


擁有豐富的動畫H場景，當你被魔物打倒、被施加催眠術後被拉走，或是從商人那邊借了太多的金錢卻無法償還時，都會被強制開始一個又一個的色色事件!

換裝系統


擁有各式各樣的特殊衣服可以讓玩家們挑選!可以透過在地下城中打開寶箱或是從商人那邊購買獲得，甚至還有被魔物抓到後被強制穿上的H服裝!?

data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: 64bit OS - Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel I5 4690 / AMD FX 8350
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GTX 970 / RX 480
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: 64bit OS - Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i7-4790K / AMD Ryzen 5 1600
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia 2060 / RX 5700
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間

data.name: The Knight Girl And Dungeons
data.detailed_description:
💘CHECK THIS OUT!💘




About the Game

Game description


As the strongest female knight in the kingdom, you are trusted by the villagers to explore the dreaded Dungeon.Dive into the depths of the Dungeon and defeat the evil demons.This is a 3D, third-person action game where the player must go into the battlefield alone, gathering supplies and building up strength as you go.But if the enemy catches you, there is hell to pay...

H Scene


With a wealth of animated H-scenes, If you've been knocked down by a demon, pulled away after being hypnotised, or borrowed too much money from a merchant and can't pay it back, you'll be forced into one erotic event after another!

Dressing system


There are a variety of special outfits for players to choose from!You can get them by opening treasure chests in dungeons or buying them from merchants, and there's even an H costume that you're forced to wear after being captured by a demon!

Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: 64bit OS - Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel I5 4690 / AMD FX 8350
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia GTX 970 / RX 480
  • Storage: 6 GB available space

  • OS: 64bit OS - Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel Core i7-4790K / AMD Ryzen 5 1600
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia 2060 / RX 5700
